parameters.jsCode:
const email = $json.query?.email || '';
return [{ json: { email, query: { email } } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT checkout_url, paddle_transaction_id
FROM (
    WITH first_try AS (
        SELECT checkout_url, paddle_transaction_id
        FROM leads
        WHERE lower(trim(email)) = lower(trim($1))
          AND (
              nullif(trim(coalesce(checkout_url, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
              OR nullif(trim(coalesce(paddle_transaction_id, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
          )
        ORDER BY updated_at DESC NULLS LAST
        LIMIT 1
    ),
    pause AS (
        SELECT pg_sleep(2)
        WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM first_try)
    ),
    second_try AS (
        SELECT checkout_url, paddle_transaction_id
        FROM leads
        WHERE lower(trim(email)) = lower(trim($1))
          AND (
              nullif(trim(coalesce(checkout_url, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
              OR nullif(trim(coalesce(paddle_transaction_id, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
          )
        ORDER BY updated_at DESC NULLS LAST
        LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT checkout_url, paddle_transaction_id
    FROM first_try

    UNION ALL

    SELECT checkout_url, paddle_transaction_id
    FROM second_try
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM first_try)
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pause)

    LIMIT 1
) q;
